title: arundinella miliacea
intro: Arundinella miliacea, also known as Bengal grass or rice grass, is a type of grass native to tropical Asia, particularly in India and Sri Lanka. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Arundinella miliacea include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and acting as an expectorant to relieve congestion. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations also include making it into a paste or powder for topical application.
